requirements.desc: Move all current acceptance tests into preset-local src/presets/<name>/tests/acceptance/test.js
Move each preset fixture into preset-local tests/acceptance/fixtures without sharing
Keep tests/acceptance/run.js and tests/acceptance/lib while updating discovery and fixture resolution
Update npm test and preset-specific execution to include preset-local acceptance tests
Exclude tests from published package and update src/AGENTS.md acceptance-test rules

notes: approach: Q&A で要件を整理してから仕様書を作成する / branch: Git worktree from development
draft: docs are older than source; user chose to skip sdd-forge build
draft: scope includes the test migration and all related supporting changes
draft: include publish-related changes and src/AGENTS.md updates in required outcomes
draft: scope covers all current acceptance tests under tests/acceptance
draft: fixtures must be moved into each preset and not shared across presets
draft: move each existing acceptance test into its matching preset directory and rename files to test.js
draft: keep tests/acceptance/run.js and change its discovery targets to preset-local acceptance tests
approval: user approved the spec without further changes
gate: clarified intra-P1 priority as relocation -> runner compatibility -> test discovery
gate: added explicit When conditions to AGENTS.md requirements R16 and R17
gate: rewrote requirements R1-R19 into explicit When/If-shall format
test: verified acceptance runner help, nonexistent preset error, npm pack exclusions, parent-chain e2e, acceptance report e2e, and preset-local node acceptance execution
implement: relocated acceptance tests and fixtures into preset-local directories, updated runners/helpers, fixed dependent e2e tests, and updated src/AGENTS.md
review: applied approved proposals 1,2,4 and re-ran follow-up tests (report.test, parent-chain.test, acceptance run node, preset nonexistent)
request: $sdd-forge.flow-plan issue #19 の対応を進めてください。
